shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg -n \"renderCustomHeader|changeMonth|activeMonth|month.*index|monthIndex|monthsShown\" src tests | head -240 && printf '\\n-- files --\\n' && rg --files | head -120"
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"monthSelectedIn|handleSelect|handleDayClick\" src/index.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/test | head -160 && sed -n '560,760p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '300,410p' src/calendar.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '760,875p' src/index.tsx && sed -n '240,290p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '1020,1090p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '400,460p' src/test/month_test.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,230p' src/calendar.tsx && sed -n '230,320p' src/calendar.tsx && rg -n \"setPreSelection|setOpen|monthSelectedIn\" src/index.tsx src/calendar.tsx | tail -80 && sed -n '1,150p' src/test/calendar_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'yarn eslint src/index.tsx && git diff --check && git status --short'
